about.meta.title.value: About Susana | Roswell, GA Family & Newborn Photographer
about.meta.title.label: Page title (shows in Google)

about.meta.description.value: Meet Susana Stethers — a Roswell, Georgia family photographer creating relaxed, kid-friendly sessions and light, airy images that feel natural and timeless.
about.meta.description.label: Google description (aim for 150–160 characters)

about.page.hi-i-m-susana-the-photographe.value: Hi, I’m Susana — the photographer behind the camera.
about.page.hi-i-m-susana-the-photographe.label: Hi, I’m Susana — the photographer behind the camera.

about.page.i-m-a-roswell-ga-family-photo.value: I’m a Roswell, GA family photographer specializing in newborn, family, maternity, milestone, and couples photography. I’m drawn to the beauty in everyday moments — soft light, genuine connection, and the small details that make each season of life meaningful.
about.page.i-m-a-roswell-ga-family-photo.label: I’m a Roswell, GA family photographer specializing in new…

about.page.as-a-mom-myself-i-understand-.value: As a mom myself, I understand how fleeting these moments are and how quickly life changes. That perspective shapes the way I approach every session. My goal is to create a relaxed, comfortable experience where your family can slow down, be present, and simply enjoy time together.
about.page.as-a-mom-myself-i-understand-.label: As a mom myself, I understand how fleeting these moments …

about.page.my-sessions-are-kid-friendly-.value: My sessions are kid-friendly and guided in a natural way, making space for both quiet moments and playful energy. I love working with children of all personalities — from shy little ones who need time to warm up to high-energy kids who want to run, explore, and be themselves. I’ll happily get on the floor, follow their lead, and gently guide you so nothing ever feels awkward or forced.
about.page.my-sessions-are-kid-friendly-.label: My sessions are kid-friendly and guided in a natural way,…

about.page.outside-of-photography-i-m-in.value: Outside of photography, I’m inspired by flowers, beautiful spaces, travel, and event planning — anything that celebrates creativity and thoughtful details. That love for beauty and intention carries into my work, where I focus on creating light, airy images that feel natural, warm, and timeless.
about.page.outside-of-photography-i-m-in.label: Outside of photography, I’m inspired by flowers, beautifu…

about.page.my-goal-is-to-preserve-your-f.value: My goal is to preserve your family’s memories in a way that feels honest and enduring — images you’ll return to years from now and remember exactly how this season of life felt.
about.page.my-goal-is-to-preserve-your-f.label: My goal is to preserve your family’s memories in a way th…

experience.page.my-sessions-are-designed.value: My sessions are designed to feel easy, comfortable, and enjoyable — especially for little ones. From the very beginning, my goal is to create a relaxed experience where your family feels at ease and free to be yourselves.
experience.page.my-sessions-are-designed.label: My sessions are designed to feel easy, comfortable, and e…

experience.page.i-take-the-time-to-conne.value: I take the time to connect with your children, meet them where they are, and help them feel safe and confident in front of the camera. Whether your child is shy and needs a few minutes to warm up or full of energy and ready to explore, I embrace it all.
experience.page.i-take-the-time-to-conne.label: I take the time to connect with your children, meet them …

experience.page.i-ll-get-on-their-level-.value: I’ll get on their level, follow their lead, and get silly when needed — while gently guiding you so nothing ever feels awkward or forced. You don’t need perfectly behaved kids or practiced smiles. The most meaningful images come from real connection, and that starts with everyone feeling comfortable.

experience.page.once-you-book-i-ll-guide.value: Once you book, I’ll guide you through simple preparation so you feel ready and relaxed. This includes outfit suggestions, location guidance, and help choosing the best timing for your session.
